retry_reason: The put operation always decrements the refcount; there is no failure mode (the caller must already hold a valid reference). Retrying would cause a use-after-free.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases a reference to a struct btrfs_chunk_map by decrementing its reference count. If the count reaches zero, the object is freed. Designed for use with the __free() automatic cleanup attribute (via DEFINE_FREE macro); can also be called manually. After calling, the caller must not access the pointer. The refcount decrement is unconditional and always performed.
